title: Issue a certificate linked to an existing reception and see it listed
description: Verifies a compliance officer can create a certificate by linking an existing reception through the search modal, completing certificate details, and seeing the issued certificate in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /samples
Start a new reception entry
Fill a unique analysis request number into the analysis request number field
Fill a unique notification number into the notification number field
Fill a unique declaration number into the declaration number field
Fill a supplier name into the supplier field
Fill a sender name into the sender field
Fill an origin into the origin field
Submit the reception form
Navigate to /certificates
Start a new certificate issuance
Search for the newly created reception in the reception search modal
Select the reception from the search results to link it
Fill the required certificate details
Submit the certificate issuance
Verify the issued certificate appears in the certificates list
Verify the certificate shows it is linked to at least one reception

title: Create a new sample reception and see it listed with linkage status
description: Verifies a reception can be created with all required metadata and appears in the receptions grid with a certificate linkage status indicator.

steps.description: Navigate to /samples
Start a new reception entry
Fill a unique analysis request number into the analysis request number field
Fill a unique notification number into the notification number field
Fill a unique declaration number into the declaration number field
Fill a supplier name into the supplier field
Fill a sender name into the sender field
Fill an origin into the origin field
Submit the reception form
Verify the new reception appears in the receptions grid
Verify the reception shows an initial certificate linkage status in the grid

title: Bulk issue a grouped certificate for multiple receptions and download/print PDF
description: Verifies grouped certificate issuance works by selecting multiple receptions within limits, issuing one certificate, and producing a printable/downloadable PDF output.

steps.description: Navigate to /samples
Start a new reception entry
Fill a unique analysis request number into the analysis request number field
Fill a unique notification number into the notification number field
Fill a unique declaration number into the declaration number field
Fill a supplier name into the supplier field
Fill a sender name into the sender field
Fill an origin into the origin field
Submit the reception form
Start a new reception entry
Fill a different unique analysis request number into the analysis request number field
Fill a different unique notification number into the notification number field
Fill a different unique declaration number into the declaration number field
Fill a supplier name into the supplier field
Fill a sender name into the sender field
Fill an origin into the origin field
Submit the reception form
Navigate to /certificates
Start a new certificate issuance
Search for receptions matching the newly created items in the reception search modal
Select multiple receptions from the search results to link them
Fill the required certificate details for grouped receptions
Submit the certificate issuance
Open the PDF output for the newly issued certificate
Verify the certificate indicates it is linked to multiple receptions
Verify a printable or downloadable PDF view is displayed for the issued certificate

title: Add multiple receptions in sequence and see them appended to the grid
description: Verifies a clerk can enter multiple receptions back-to-back and the grid updates to include all newly created receptions.

steps.description: Navigate to /samples
Start a new reception entry
Fill a unique analysis request number into the analysis request number field
Fill a unique notification number into the notification number field
Fill a unique declaration number into the declaration number field
Fill a supplier name into the supplier field
Fill a sender name into the sender field
Fill an origin into the origin field
Submit the reception form
Start a new reception entry
Fill a different unique analysis request number into the analysis request number field
Fill a different unique notification number into the notification number field
Fill a different unique declaration number into the declaration number field
Fill a supplier name into the supplier field
Fill a sender name into the sender field
Fill an origin into the origin field
Submit the reception form
Verify at least two newly created receptions are present in the receptions grid
Verify the receptions grid remains usable after consecutive creations

title: Issue Certificate quick action opens reception search and proceeds to issuance
description: Verifies the dashboard Issue Certificate quick action opens the reception search modal and allows selecting a reception to proceed into the certificate issuance form.

steps.description: Navigate to /samples
Start a new reception entry
Fill a unique analysis request number into the analysis request number field
Fill a unique notification number into the notification number field
Fill a unique declaration number into the declaration number field
Fill a supplier name into the supplier field
Fill a sender name into the sender field
Fill an origin into the origin field
Submit the reception form
Navigate to /
Click the issue certificate quick action
Search for the newly created reception in the reception search modal
Select the reception from the search results to link it
Verify the certificate issuance form is shown with at least one linked reception
Verify the user can proceed with entering certificate details

title: Dashboard shows key counters and monthly trend charts
description: Verifies the dashboard renders high-level counters and monthly charts for samples and certificates so an operations user can monitor activity at a glance.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the dashboard statistics to finish loading
Verify high-level counters for samples and certificates are displayed
Verify monthly trend charts for samples and certificates are displayed

title: Quick Search takes user to Samples with search focused
description: Verifies Quick Search from the dashboard navigates to the samples view with the search UI focused for immediate lookup.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the quick search action
Verify the user lands on the samples view
Verify the samples search input is focused

title: Download a PDF report for a selected date range and type
description: User generates a PDF report for a chosen report type and date range and the browser starts a PDF download after generation.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Select a report type
Fill a valid start date into the date range start field
Fill a valid end date into the date range end field
Generate the PDF export
Verify a PDF download is initiated

title: Required field validation prevents submitting an incomplete reception
description: Verifies the reception form blocks submission when a required field is missing and shows a field-level validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /samples
Start a new reception entry
Fill a unique analysis request number into the analysis request number field
Fill a unique notification number into the notification number field
Fill a unique declaration number into the declaration number field
Fill a supplier name into the supplier field
Fill a sender name into the sender field
Leave the origin field empty
Submit the reception form
Verify a required-field validation error is visible for the missing field
Verify the reception is not added to the receptions grid

title: Cannot issue a certificate without linking a reception
description: Verifies the certificate workflow enforces reception linkage by showing a validation error when trying to issue without selecting any reception.

steps.description: Navigate to /certificates
Start a new certificate issuance
Proceed past the reception search modal without selecting any reception
Fill the required certificate details
Submit the certificate issuance
Verify a validation error is shown indicating a reception must be linked before issuing
Verify no new certificate is added to the certificates list

title: Generate a PDF report scoped to a single entity with charts suppressed
description: User scopes the report to a single entity and generates a PDF where redundant charts are not shown for that scoped entity.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Select a report type
Apply a filter that scopes the report to a single entity
Fill a valid start date into the date range start field
Fill a valid end date into the date range end field
Generate the PDF export
Verify the generated PDF preview indicates charts are suppressed for a single-entity scope

title: Change filters and regenerate export reflects updated criteria
description: User changes report filters and regenerates an export, and the UI reflects that a new export has been generated for the updated criteria.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Select a report type
Fill a valid start date into the date range start field
Fill a valid end date into the date range end field
Generate the PDF export
Change the report filter criteria
Generate the PDF export
Verify the UI indicates a new export was generated for the updated criteria

title: Prevent report generation when the date range is incomplete
description: User attempts to generate a report with a missing start or end date and sees a date validation error instead of a download.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Select a report type
Fill a valid start date into the date range start field
Clear the date range end field
Generate the PDF export
Verify a date validation error is visible
